textPreview:
CONGRATULATIONS!!!

You have been PRE-SELECTED for a Work From Home Data Entry Internship. No experience required. Anyon...

redFlags.message: 💸 Requests payment or fees from the applicant
redFlags.tip: Legitimate internships never ask you to pay to apply or get selected.

redFlags.message: 🏦 Asks for bank account or financial details
redFlags.tip: Never share your bank details with an employer before joining.

redFlags.message: ⚡ Uses urgent or pressure language ("limited slots", "act now")
redFlags.tip: Scammers create false urgency to stop you from thinking clearly.

redFlags.message: 💰 Promises unrealistically high earnings for minimal work
redFlags.tip: If the stipend seems too good to be true, it almost always is.

redFlags.message: 📋 Vague or generic job description with no real responsibilities
redFlags.tip: Genuine internships specify exact roles, skills, and teams.

redFlags.message: 📱 Asks you to communicate only via WhatsApp or Telegram
redFlags.tip: Legitimate companies use official email or career portals for hiring.

redFlags.message: 🪪 Requests sensitive personal documents upfront (Aadhaar, PAN)
redFlags.tip: Documents are only collected after an official offer letter is issued.
